overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing the protagonist standing on hexagonal basalt rock formations along a misty coastline. The character slowly surveys the rugged terrain, turning from a towering cliff face toward an expansive foggy valley with distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal inlet with vertical basalt cliff walls

agents.ego_description: standing stationary on hexagonal rock formations, facing the towering cliff wall and assessing the turbulent water below

entered.detail: tall dark basalt cliff face with vertical striations dominating the right side of the view
geometric basalt column formations forming the ground beneath the character's feet
turbulent grey-blue seawater crashing against the rocks at the base of the cliff
diffused white-grey cloud cover creating a misty atmospheric backdrop

segments.scene_description: The character stands on hexagonal basalt rocks at the edge of a turbulent inlet, facing a massive vertical cliff wall. The atmosphere is misty and overcast, with churning water visible between the rock platform and the cliff face.

scene_state.functional_zone: expansive misty coastal valley with distant mountain peaks

events.description: character rotates to face open coastal valley as the cliff wall recedes from view, revealing distant mountains

agents.ego_description: rotating rightward to survey the open waterway and distant misty mountain range, maintaining steady footing on the rocks

entered.detail: hazy silhouetted peaks visible through the mist at the end of the coastal valley
gradual rocky hillside with sparse vegetation rising on the left side of the frame

segments.scene_description: As the character turns away from the cliff, the scene opens into a wide misty valley with distant mountains visible through the haze. The turbulent water now stretches into the distance on the right, while a rocky slope rises on the left, creating an expansive coastal vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from a claustrophobic encounter with a towering cliff to an expansive view of a misty coastal valley. It begins with the character standing on hexagonal basalt rocks at the edge of a turbulent inlet, facing a massive vertical cliff wall under an overcast sky. As the character turns away from the stone face, the perspective opens up to reveal a wide valley where distant mountains emerge through the haze. The scene then expands into a vast vista, with the churning water stretching into the distance on the right while a rocky slope rises on the left.
